meta.heat_criteria: Any 2 of: |day move| > 5%; volume > 3x 30d avg; news catalyst within 4h. Rank by heat_score. Losers qualify — hot means attention, not direction. Never padded.
meta.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Not investment advice.
